description: This file defines the Popover class for Bootstrap, extending Tooltip, and includes configuration, methods, and jQuery plugin integration for popover UI components.

classes.name: Popover
classes.description: A class extending Tooltip to implement popover UI component with additional content handling and jQuery integration.

methods.name: Default
methods.description: Getter for default configuration options for Popover.

methods.name: DefaultType
methods.description: Getter for default type configuration for Popover.

methods.name: NAME
methods.description: Getter for the component name identifier.

methods.name: _isWithContent
methods.description: Checks if the popover has content to display.

methods.name: _getContentForTemplate
methods.description: Prepares content for the popover template.

methods.name: _getContent
methods.description: Retrieves the content for the popover, resolving functions if necessary.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Static method to interface with jQuery, enabling method calls on jQuery collections.
